summary: Fix (error): Changed CSS `-webkit-line-clamp` from `7` to `4` in `src/components/TestimonialCard.astro` and updated `max-height` from `calc(1.7em * 7)` to `calc(1.7em * 4)`. Updated comment from 'Line clamp to 7 lines' to 'Line clamp to 4 lines'. This satisfies the Acceptance Criterion: 'TestimonialCard.astro clamps testimonial text to 4 lines'.
Fix (feedback): Updated i18n close label in `src/i18n/es.ts` from 'Cerrar testimonio' to 'Cerrar' per spec table.
Fix (feedback): Updated i18n close label in `src/i18n/en.ts` from 'Close testimonial' to 'Close' per spec table.
Fix (feedback): Updated i18n close label in `src/i18n/zh.ts` from '关闭评价' to '关闭' per spec table.
Phase 4 — Build Validation: npm run build — 7 pages built, 0 errors. npx astro check — 0 errors, 0 warnings, 11 pre-existing hints.
errors_resolved: Spec Deviation | src/components/TestimonialCard.astro | CSS `-webkit-line-clamp` was `7`, spec requires `4` — FIXED
feedback_addressed: CSS line-clamp corrected from 7 to 4 — FIXED
i18n close keys corrected to spec-specified values: 'Cerrar'/'Close'/'关闭' — FIXED
